feedItems.description: allocated £26.3m to Environment & Streets (≈£159 per resident)
allocated £33.6m to Children's Social Care (≈£204 per resident)
allocated £74.5m to Adult Social Care (≈£451 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £119 (5.3%) to £2383
